title: Friendly
excerpt: A friendly attitude means one creature currently regards another with goodwill and is inclined toward cooperation, help, or other favorable treatment.
markdown:
# Friendly

A friendly attitude describes a creature that presently regards another creature with goodwill. It wants that other creature to fare well and is disposed toward cooperation, reassurance, or aid.

## Rules Use

Friendly does not guarantee obedience, self-sacrifice, or permanent alliance. It indicates that the current relationship is favorable, so requests, negotiation, and other social pressure begin from a more cooperative state than indifference or hostility.

## Relationship State

A friendly attitude is part of the world's current social state, not a permanent label. Harm, betrayal, fear, competing loyalties, or major changes in circumstance can weaken it, while trust, gratitude, or shared cause can reinforce it.
